DescribeLLMMetricData.metrics: List of metric queries, each containing name (metric name, required) and compareTo (year-over-year comparison, optional, values: yesterday/lastweek/specific date)
DescribeLLMMetricData.metrics.name: Metric name
DescribeLLMMetricData.metrics.compareTo: Comparison period. Options: `yesterday` - compare to yesterday, `lastweek` - compare to last week, `YYYY-mm-dd` - compare to a specific date, `5m`/`1h` - period-over-period comparison
DescribeLLMMetricData.metrics.filters: Metric-specific filter conditions, merged with global filters
DescribeLLMMetricData.filters.op: Filter operator. Options: `=` - equal, `:` - equal, `!=` - not equal, `contains` - contains, `in` - in array, `>` - greater than, `>=` - greater than or equal to, `<` - less than, `<=` - less than or equal to
DescribeLLMMetricData.filters.value: Single value, applicable to operators: =, !=, contains, >, >=, <, <=
DescribeLLMMetricData.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeLLMMetricData.limit: Maximum number of results to return; if not set, returns as many as possible
DescribeLLMMetricData.periodSeconds: Time aggregation period in seconds, default 0. If 0 or not set, a single aggregation point is computed over the entire time range
DescribeLLMMetricData.aggregate: Aggregation function for returned values. Options: sum (summation), sumPerSecond (sum divided by elapsed seconds to get per-second average)
